_doc.what: Codex Orbit's patch MODULE registry. Each module is one cohesive feature of the patcher (stable/patch_codex.py), declared as data. The userFacing+toggleable ones surface as checkboxes in the wrapper's PATCHES section and pass --disable <id> to the patcher.
_doc.how: Codex Orbit's patcher is a single appended IIFE (the sidebar) plus a few host/webview-chunk injections (workspace meta, status hook, host channel, native row openers). The sidebar IIFE is monolithic, so its sub-features are 'required' (baked in) today; the separately-injected host pieces are independently gateable. id MUST equal the patcher's GATEABLE_FEATURES string for the toggleable ones.

tiers.core: Always applied. The sidebar IIFE + the scaffolding every feature needs.
tiers.host: Separate injections into Codex's host bundle / webview chunks (workspace meta, status hook, host channel, native openers).
tiers.sidebar: Sub-features rendered inside the monolithic sidebar IIFE (sessions, sort, status, color, archive, filter, settings). Required today; split out as the IIFE is decomposed.

fields.required: true = always applied, cannot be disabled.
fields.userFacing: true = surfaced as a wrapper PATCHES toggle.
fields.gates: the patcher function/call this module controls (traceability).
fields.verify: marker string proving it applied (logged by the patcher / present in the built VSIX).

modules.title: Codex Orbit sidebar
modules.summary: The appended self-contained sidebar IIFE: our panel, Codex's chats by project, search, New Task, collapse, resize. The root every other feature lives in.

modules.title: Native row openers
modules.summary: Exposes Codex's real local/remote row-open closures so clicking an Orbit row routes via Codex's own navigation (no guessed URLs).

modules.title: Host action channel
modules.summary: Tees Codex's single acquireVsCodeApi() into a global so Orbit can post the SAME host messages Codex does (archive, run-command for the settings menu).

modules.title: Current-workspace filter
modules.summary: Host stamps the real VS Code workspace into the webview HTML (single source of truth) so the sidebar shows ONLY this workspace's chats. Off = the webview falls back to heuristics (every project shows).

modules.title: Live status dots
modules.summary: Hooks Codex's updateConversationState so each row shows live status — spinner (thinking), orange (question), red (failed). Off = rows show the relative time only.

modules.title: Counted sections
modules.summary: Collapsible Starred / Pinned / Sessions / Archived headers with count badges, newest-first.

modules.title: Row + hover actions
modules.summary: Two-line row (title + time/status), status dot, hover star/pin/color/archive, selected-chat indicator.

modules.title: Per-chat color
modules.summary: Assign an accent color to a chat (ours; Codex ships no palette). Right-click swatches + hover color button.

modules.title: Settings menu
modules.summary: Gear menu posting Codex's own run-command ids (account & usage, switch model/account, custom instructions, color theme) + Copy diagnostics.
